summary: Phase 6C-2 frontend testing complete. Pricing page at /en/pricing fully functional. All 12 test requirements verified via HTML inspection + Playwright automation.
critical_code_review_comments: AdSlot correctly uses subscriptionService.shouldShowAds(planId) and returns null when adsEnabled=false — requirement met
All pricing data driven from subscription-config.ts via SubscriptionService — no hardcoded plan names in UI
TypeScript compiles with zero errors (npx tsc --noEmit exit 0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 6C-2 requirements verified. Pricing page /en/pricing: HTTP 200, 4 plan cards (Free $0, Starter $7.99, Pro $14.99, Business $29.99), billing toggle switches to yearly (Starter $6.39/mo), -20% badge on yearly toggle, amber Coming Soon banner (PREMIUM_ENABLED=false), Free CTA enabled, paid CTAs disabled, Pro 'Most Popular' badge, Business 'Best Value' badge, feature comparison table with check/minus icons, expand/hide toggle working, Pricing link in navbar. AdSlot accepts planId prop and returns null when adsEnabled=false. TypeScript zero errors.
